hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=j.tool_input?.command||'';if(cmd.match(/git\s+push/)){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'IMPORTANT: Before pushing, run npm run test:all to verify all 4 test layers pass. If tests have not been run this session, run them now before pushing.'}}));}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||j.tool_input?.filePath||'';const base=f.split('/').pop();if(['LICENSE','README.md'].includes(base)){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Blocked: '+base+' is a protected file. Confirm with user before modifying.'}));}})"
